name: healthcare-emergency-connect
description: Hackathon-ready ambulance request, driver dispatch, live tracking, and hospital availability prototype.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm.cmd --prefix server run dev" "npm.cmd --prefix client run dev"
scripts.dev:unix: concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm.cmd install && npm.cmd --prefix client install && npm.cmd --prefix server install
